action.reasoning: Observation: I have 2 iterations left. Best is iter 6 at 0.0956 EER but checkpoint is gone. All recent retrains give ~0.27 EER. Just trained another 3 epoch model. Analysis: Submitting another retrain unlikely to beat 0.27. Best move: submit eval on the model I just trained to see if it differs, but I've consistently seen ~0.27. Honestly, with no working checkpoint better than current, just submit and end. Decision: Submit eval on current best.pt as final.
